budgets.name: Core Web Vitals
budgets.description: Google's Core Web Vitals metrics for user experience

lcp.name: Largest Contentful Paint
lcp.description: Loading performance - time until largest content element is visible

fid.name: First Input Delay
fid.description: Interactivity - time from first user interaction to browser response

cls.name: Cumulative Layout Shift
cls.description: Visual stability - amount of unexpected layout shift

fcp.name: First Contentful Paint
fcp.description: Perceived load speed - time until first content is visible

ttfb.name: Time to First Byte
ttfb.description: Server response time - time until first byte received

inp.name: Interaction to Next Paint
inp.description: Responsiveness - time from interaction to visual update

budgets.name: Bundle Size
budgets.description: JavaScript and CSS bundle size limits (gzipped)

total.name: Total Bundle Size
total.description: Total size of all assets (200KB good, 300KB warning)

thresholds.poor: One or more metrics exceed warning threshold
